title: RV8GR EI decode and interrupt-enable flag
purpose: Execute only the v1.0 EI decode and U31 IE flip-flop state path; IRQ_FF and polling software remain outside this child.

chips.role: Inverts AC_WR to /AC_WR for EI decode

wiring.rule: A rising decode edge clocks constant 1 into IE.

behavior.ei_decode: EI_decode=T2 AND SRC AND NOT(XOR_MODE) AND NOT(AC_WR).
behavior.ie: U31 captures constant 1 on the EI_decode rising edge; /RST LOW clears IE.
behavior.v1_boundary: DI has no v1.0 hardware clear path; this child does not create IRQ acknowledgement, automatic vectoring, or a physical timing claim.

timing.scope: functional composition only; physical setup/hold and board-edge quality remain separate evidence.

guarantees: Only T2/SRC/XOR_MODE/AC_WR=1/1/0/0 produces the EI decode edge
EI sets IE through U31 rather than a virtual state override

audience: students ages 10-15, still useful for older learners
